channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Marks and Spencer’s car park, 19th July
item.description:
The stop, give way and no entry signs and road markings need renewing, as you enter the car park there needs to be actual no entry signs fixed at eye level so that vehicles stop turning right as a shortcut and impede other traffic following the one way rd out.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Non electric car parked in charging bay for several hours blocking charger for ev users, 19th July
item.description:
Non rlectric car parked in charging bay for several hours blocking charger for ev users. I was unable to charge all day due to this vehicle being parked in wrong place.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lea Bridge Service Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest bike parked blocking drive, 19th July
item.description:
As per the photo attached.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Heights, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking, 19th July
item.description:
Why are people still getting away with parking on double yellows over night every night don't put them there if your not gonna fine people I reported this so many times now sort it or I part ticket me I won't pay and take me court I got prove you ain't doing your job. And keep letting people park on double yellows every night sort it out Greenwich council
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Downs Dog Poo 4.0, 19th July
item.description:
More dog poo around 1 -9 downs lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downs Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light hit and leaning unsure if it’s working, 19th July
item.description:
Light on corner has been knocked and is leaning
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakley Road, Keston Mark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation from garden blocking pavement, 19th July
item.description:
202 Gypsy Road, garden vegetaion is overhanging the pavement so much you have to walk on the road to pass. very dangerous for such a busy school run road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gipsy Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bag of rubbish (purple Bromley bag), 19th July
item.description:
Dumped rubbish
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kings Hall Road, New Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Lime Bike Still Abandoned - Brackley/Worsley Bridge Road, 19th July
item.description:
Reported 2 Life Bikes abandoned, but one remaining - pic attached.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vandalised bicycle Blackheath Village in cycle racks outside former Lloyds Bank Building, 19th July
item.description:
Abandoned vandalised bicycle Blackheath Village in cycle racks outside former Lloyds Bank Building Been there some mints and getting damaged further often Needs to be removed See photographs Thank you It is here Https://www.instantstreetview.com/@51.465315,0.009124,76.91h,-6.04p,2.7z,9n6WJx164PLX6drLqQA2zg

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Lee Road, Kidbrooke, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durham Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Milman, 19th July
item.description:
Just filthy with litter. How on earth does Brent get away with such dismal cleaning of streets
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Milman Road, London

item.title: Summerfield, 19th July
item.description:
Absolutely filthy with littter

item.title: Fly Tipping, 19th July
item.description:
Have posted twice about the fly tipping at this spot. Each time it’s cleared it still keeps happening. Please could this be resolved

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pitfield Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
